appStore.title: Farm Games Animal Puzzles for Kids, Toddlers Free
appStore.description:
Explore the farmyard from Bessie's barn to Cool Chicken's coop and all the way to Scarecrow's garden as you help a colorful cast of farm animals solve magical puzzles and explore animated landscapes!

You'll meet lots of new friends like pigs, goats, chickens, ducks and cows in the barn, through the garden, in the pen, across the field and even while visiting the farmer's singing troupe! 

• Feed the pigs
• Build a scarecrow
• Put the animals in the barn
• Explore the apple orchard

PARENTS AND TEACHERS
This app challenges kids to solve problems, recognize shapes, memorize pieces, and set small goals as they develop hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills.

We provide parental options and lots of positive encouragement to ensure your child has a safe space to play and learn. 

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!”

- Blake, Amanda, Mike & Urszula, Eggroll Games
